                        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Wreck of steamer lost in 1872 discovered  in Lake Michigan]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/wreck-of-steamer-lost-in-1872-discovered-in-lake-michigan</link>
            <description><![CDATA[A group that works to discover shipwrecks around the world, announced Friday that a team led by shipwreck hunter Paul Ehorn found the Lac La Belle about 20 miles offshore between Racine and Kenosha, Wisconsin. ]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 15 Feb 2026 16:26:29 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/wreck-of-steamer-lost-in-1872-discovered-in-lake-michigan</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/lake-michigan"><![CDATA[lake michigan]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/shipwreck"><![CDATA[shipwreck]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/wisconsin"><![CDATA[wisconsin]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Todd Richmond, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2025-06-15T214956Z_500182564_RC213FA3QWTD_RTRMADP_3_USA-DAILYLIFE-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Partial government shutdown drags on amid immigration oversight battle]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/partial-government-shutdown-drags-on-amid-immigration-oversight-battle</link>
            <description><![CDATA[A partial government shutdown began Saturday after congressional Democrats and President Donald Trump's team failed to reach a deal on legislation to fund the department through September. ]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 15 Feb 2026 15:30:56 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/partial-government-shutdown-drags-on-amid-immigration-oversight-battle</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/Department-of-Homeland-Security"><![CDATA[Department of Homeland Security]]></category>

                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/government-shutdown"><![CDATA[Government Shutdown]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/homeland-security"><![CDATA[Homeland Security]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/ice"><![CDATA[ice]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/immigration"><![CDATA[immigration]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Aamer Madhani, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-02-15T191020Z_935771935_RC2IMJAGDL5G_RTRMADP_3_USA-CONGRESS-SHUTDOWN-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Israel's plan to install West Bank regulations denounced as illegal 'mega land grab']]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/israels-plan-to-install-west-bank-regulations-denounced-as-illegal-mega-land-grab</link>
            <description><![CDATA[The move would pave the way for the resumption of "settlement of land title" processes, which had been frozen in the West Bank since the Mideast War in 1967. ]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 15 Feb 2026 14:48:25 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/israels-plan-to-install-west-bank-regulations-denounced-as-illegal-mega-land-grab</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/illegal-settlements"><![CDATA[illegal settlements]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/israel"><![CDATA[Israel]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/land-grabs"><![CDATA[land grabs]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/palestine"><![CDATA[palestine]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/palestinians"><![CDATA[Palestinians]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/settlers"><![CDATA[Settlers]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/west-bank"><![CDATA[west bank]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Melanie Lidman, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2025-11-04T091850Z_2013688735_RC2IPHA61O72_RTRMADP_3_ISRAEL-PALESTINIANS-OLIVE-HARVEST-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Iran's state media reports foreign minister will attend indirect talks with the U.S.]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/irans-state-media-reports-foreign-minister-will-attend-indirect-talks-with-the-u-s</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and his delegation left for the Swiss city of Geneva after the first round of indirect talks took place in Oman last week. ]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 15 Feb 2026 14:14:53 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/irans-state-media-reports-foreign-minister-will-attend-indirect-talks-with-the-u-s</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/abbas-araghchi"><![CDATA[Abbas Araghchi]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/donald-trump"><![CDATA[Donald Trump news]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/iran"><![CDATA[Iran]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/iran-nuclear-program"><![CDATA[iran nuclear program]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2025/11/2025-10-05T095413Z_2054928136_RC2L5HAPSEZ0_RTRMADP_3_IRAN-NUCLEAR-1024x707.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="707" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Trump's border czar says smaller force of ICE agents will remain in Minnesota amid drawdown]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/trumps-border-czar-says-drawdown-of-ice-agents-in-minnesota-continues-but-smaller-force-will-remain</link>
            <description><![CDATA[He also said agents will keep investigating fraud allegations as well as the anti-immigration enforcement protest that disrupted a service at a church service.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 15 Feb 2026 13:44:57 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/trumps-border-czar-says-drawdown-of-ice-agents-in-minnesota-continues-but-smaller-force-will-remain</guid>

                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/tom-homan"><![CDATA[tom homan]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Ben Finley, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-01-29T134013Z_1373649623_RC2ZAJABLMSO_RTRMADP_3_USA-TRUMP-MINNESOTA-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Ukraine drone strike hits Russian Black Sea port ahead of peace talks]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/ukraine-drone-strike-hits-russian-black-sea-port-ahead-of-peace-talks</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Meanwhile, falling debris from Russian drones damaged civilian and transport infrastructure in Ukraine's Odesa region, officials said, causing disruption to the power and water supply.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 15 Feb 2026 10:30:26 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/ukraine-drone-strike-hits-russian-black-sea-port-ahead-of-peace-talks</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/black-sea"><![CDATA[Black sea]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/peace-talks"><![CDATA[peace talks]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/russia"><![CDATA[russia]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/ukraine"><![CDATA[Ukraine]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-02-14T194544Z_1739376134_RC2VLJANI7U4_RTRMADP_3_SECURITY-MUNICH-ZELENSKIY-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[U.S. forces board another sanctioned oil tanker in the Indian Ocean]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/u-s-forces-board-another-sanctioned-oil-tanker-in-the-indian-ocean</link>
            <description><![CDATA[ The Defense Department says U.S. forces boarded the Veronica III overnight. It is a Panamanian-flagged vessel under U.S. sanctions related to Iran, according to the website of the Treasury Department's Office of Foreign Assets Control.
]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 15 Feb 2026 09:51:21 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/u-s-forces-board-another-sanctioned-oil-tanker-in-the-indian-ocean</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/caribbean"><![CDATA[Caribbean]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/donald-trump"><![CDATA[Donald Trump news]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/indian-ocean"><![CDATA[Indian Ocean]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/iran"><![CDATA[Iran]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/oil-tanker"><![CDATA[oil tanker]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/pentagon"><![CDATA[pentagon]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/veronica-iii"><![CDATA[Veronica III]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-02-06T110218Z_1561206995_RC2AGJA7QRVA_RTRMADP_3_USA-TRUMP-BUYBACKS-DEFENSE-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Europeans reject U.S. claims after Rubio's address in Munich]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/europeans-reject-u-s-claims-after-rubios-address-in-munich</link>
            <description><![CDATA[A top European Union official has rejected the notion that Europe faces "civilizational erasure," pushing back at criticism of the continent by the Trump administration. It came a day after U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio offered a somewhat reassuring message to European allies.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 15 Feb 2026 09:08:13 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/europeans-reject-u-s-claims-after-rubios-address-in-munich</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/kaja-kallas"><![CDATA[Kaja Kallas]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Emma Burrows, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Geir Moulson, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-02-15T081831Z_558332157_RC28MJA6G3WP_RTRMADP_3_SECURITY-MUNICH-1024x684.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="684" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Four astronauts arrive at International Space Station to replace NASA crew]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/four-astronauts-arrive-at-international-space-station-to-replace-nasa-crew</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Last month's medical evacuation was NASA's first in 65 years of human spaceflight. One of four astronauts launched by SpaceX last summer suffered what officials described as a serious health issue, prompting their hasty return.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 14 Feb 2026 20:04:59 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/four-astronauts-arrive-at-international-space-station-to-replace-nasa-crew</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/astronauts"><![CDATA[astronauts]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/International-Space-Station"><![CDATA[International Space Station]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/nasa"><![CDATA[NASA]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/space"><![CDATA[space]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/spacex"><![CDATA[SpaceX]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Marcia Dunn, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-02-13T073956Z_784426010_RC2PKJATULRE_RTRMADP_3_SPACE-NASA-CREW-12-1024x729.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="729" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Bangladesh's PM-elect vows to work for democracy after landslide victory]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/bangladeshs-pm-elect-vows-to-work-for-democracy-after-landslide-victory</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Tarique Rahman's Bangladesh Nationalist Party won a majority in Thursday's election in the 350-member Parliament. An 11-member alliance led by the Jamaat-e-Islami party, the country's largest Islamist party, is poised to form the opposition.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 14 Feb 2026 19:39:17 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/bangladeshs-pm-elect-vows-to-work-for-democracy-after-landslide-victory</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/bangladesh"><![CDATA[Bangladesh]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/democracy"><![CDATA[democracy]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/tarique-rahman"><![CDATA[Tarique Rahman]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Sheikh Saaliq, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Julhas Alam, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-02-14T114819Z_2013780260_RC2NLJAET7DG_RTRMADP_3_BANGLADESH-ELECTION-TARIQUE-1024x671.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="671" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Thousands demonstrate for change in Iran following deadly crackdown]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/thousands-demonstrate-for-change-in-iran-following-deadly-crackdown</link>
            <description><![CDATA[About 250,000 people have demonstrated against Iran's government on the sidelines of a gathering of world leaders in Germany. The giant protest in Munich on Saturday answered a call from Iran's exiled Crown Prince Reza Pahlavi. ]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 14 Feb 2026 17:54:38 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/thousands-demonstrate-for-change-in-iran-following-deadly-crackdown</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/global-day-of-action-rally"><![CDATA[Global Day of Action Rally]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/iran"><![CDATA[Iran]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/munich"><![CDATA[munich]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/reza-pahlavi"><![CDATA[Reza Pahlavi]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/toronto"><![CDATA[Toronto]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Stanislav Hodina, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-02-14T212339Z_1597814974_RC2RLJALBO4X_RTRMADP_3_IRAN-PROTEST-CANADA-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[How the Homeland Security shutdown is impacting travel in the U.S.]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/how-the-homeland-security-shutdown-is-impacting-travel-in-the-u-s</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Transportation Security Administration officers are expected to work without pay while lawmakers remain without an agreement on DHS' annual funding.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 14 Feb 2026 16:57:39 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/how-the-homeland-security-shutdown-is-impacting-travel-in-the-u-s</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/air-travel"><![CDATA[air travel]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/Department-of-Homeland-Security"><![CDATA[Department of Homeland Security]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/shutdown"><![CDATA[shutdown]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/transportation-security-administration"><![CDATA[Transportation Security Administration]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/tsa"><![CDATA[tsa]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Rio Yamat, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2025-11-07T171055Z_1680826960_RC2QRHAYDETO_RTRMADP_3_USA-SHUTDOWN-AIR-TRAVEL-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[African Union summit begins as discontent spreads among young people]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/african-union-summit-begins-as-discontent-spreads-among-young-people</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Africa has the youngest population in the world, with more than 400 million people aged 15 to 35 years old. But it is also home to several of the oldest and longest-serving leaders — a paradox that has contributed to an upsurge in coups.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 14 Feb 2026 16:08:38 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/african-union-summit-begins-as-discontent-spreads-among-young-people</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/african-union"><![CDATA[African Union]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/Ethiopia"><![CDATA[Ethiopia]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Evelyne Musambi, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Chinedu Asadu, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-02-14T132548Z_232503576_RC2BUCA178F3_RTRMADP_3_AFRICA-DIPLOMACY-SUMMIT-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Zelenskyy says questions remain in peace talks over security guarantees for Ukraine]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/zelenskyy-says-questions-remain-in-peace-talks-over-security-guarantees-for-ukraine</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Speaking to reporters at the Munich Security Conference in Germany on Saturday, Zelenskyy repeatedly thanked Americans and Europeans for their support and said he was surprised that Moscow had replaced the head of its negotiating team before another round of U.S.-brokered talks]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 14 Feb 2026 15:42:09 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/zelenskyy-says-questions-remain-in-peace-talks-over-security-guarantees-for-ukraine</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/peace-talks"><![CDATA[peace talks]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/russia"><![CDATA[russia]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/ukraine"><![CDATA[Ukraine]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/volodymyr-zelenskyy"><![CDATA[Volodymyr Zelenskyy]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Samya Kullab, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Emma Burrows, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Elise Morton, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-02-14T111015Z_2000635292_RC2NLJAO17QM_RTRMADP_3_SECURITY-MUNICH-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Iran and U.S. to hold nuclear talks in Geneva, Swiss minister says]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/iran-and-u-s-to-hold-nuclear-talks-in-geneva-swiss-minister-says</link>
            <description><![CDATA[The Trump administration has maintained that Iran can have no uranium enrichment under any deal. Tehran says it won't agree to that.
]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 14 Feb 2026 15:04:53 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/iran-and-u-s-to-hold-nuclear-talks-in-geneva-swiss-minister-says</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/donald-trump"><![CDATA[Donald Trump news]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/iran"><![CDATA[Iran]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/iran-nucelar-program"><![CDATA[iran nucelar program]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/nuclear-talks"><![CDATA[Nuclear Talks]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/steve-witkoff"><![CDATA[steve witkoff]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/NuclearTalks-1024x616.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="616" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[At least 32 dead in Nigeria after gunmen attack 3 communities]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/at-least-32-dead-in-nigeria-after-gunmen-attack-on-3-communities</link>
            <description><![CDATA[The dawn raid were targeted on the communities of Tunga-Makeri, Konkoso, and Pissa, in the Borgu area of Niger state.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 14 Feb 2026 14:32:02 -0500</pubDate>

            <title><![CDATA[Love is in the air  at the Winter Olympics on Valentine's Day]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/sports/love-is-in-the-air-at-the-winter-olympics-on-valentines-day</link>
            <description><![CDATA[MILAN (AP) — At the Milan Cortina Olympic Games, winning medals isn't the only thing making hearts swell. From the ice rinks to the snowy hills, love is in the frozen air. Some competitions already seem to have Cupid in attendance. Dutch skater Jutta Leerdam set an Olympic record in the 1000-meter race, then turned to find her fiancé Jake Paul in the stands; both visibly weeping, they made heart signs to one another with...]]></description>
